references.passiveText: I've heard rumors about a rival operation setting up in a nearby settlement. Could be a threat or an opportunity.
references.triggerDialogue: A smith in {location} has been undercutting prices across the region. {target_npc} says they're getting their materials from somewhere unusual, maybe {location_hint}. Either they found a new vein nobody knows about, or they're cutting corners that will catch up to them. Might be worth investigating: if their supply runs dry, the market opens up.
